testcase.name: Standard customer places an order without discount
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Standard customer places an order without discount &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-acceptance.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma product &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m named &amp#27;[1m"Java Book"&amp#27;[22m costs &amp#27;[1m50.00&amp#27;[22m with stock &amp#27;[1m10&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.aProductNamedCostsWithStock(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.math.BigDecimal,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mcustomer &amp#27;[1m"standard@example.com"&amp#27;[22m with status STANDARD orders &amp#27;[1m2&amp#27;[22m products &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.customerWithStatusStandardOrdersProducts(java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe order receipt should not be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theOrderReceiptShouldNotBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe order total should be &amp#27;[1m100.00&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theOrderTotalShouldBe(java.math.BigDecimal)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe confirmation message should be &amp#27;[1m"Order accepted for standard@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theConfirmationMessageShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product catalog should have searched product &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theProductCatalogShouldHaveSearchedProduct(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Esteban Dauchy\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.7\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.7.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: Premium customer places an order with 10 percent discount
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Premium customer places an order with 10 percent discount &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-acceptance.feature:11&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma product &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m named &amp#27;[1m"Java Book"&amp#27;[22m costs &amp#27;[1m50.00&amp#27;[22m with stock &amp#27;[1m10&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.aProductNamedCostsWithStock(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.math.BigDecimal,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mcustomer &amp#27;[1m"premium@example.com"&amp#27;[22m with status PREMIUM orders &amp#27;[1m2&amp#27;[22m products &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.customerWithStatusPremiumOrdersProducts(java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe order receipt should not be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theOrderReceiptShouldNotBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe order total should be &amp#27;[1m90.00&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theOrderTotalShouldBe(java.math.BigDecimal)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe confirmation message should be &amp#27;[1m"Order accepted for premium@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theConfirmationMessageShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product catalog should have searched product &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theProductCatalogShouldHaveSearchedProduct(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: VIP customer places an order with 20 percent discount
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m VIP customer places an order with 20 percent discount &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-acceptance.feature:19&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma product &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m named &amp#27;[1m"Java Book"&amp#27;[22m costs &amp#27;[1m50.00&amp#27;[22m with stock &amp#27;[1m10&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.aProductNamedCostsWithStock(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.math.BigDecimal,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mcustomer &amp#27;[1m"vip@example.com"&amp#27;[22m with status VIP orders &amp#27;[1m2&amp#27;[22m products &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.customerWithStatusVipOrdersProducts(java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe order receipt should not be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theOrderReceiptShouldNotBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe order total should be &amp#27;[1m80.00&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theOrderTotalShouldBe(java.math.BigDecimal)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe confirmation message should be &amp#27;[1m"Order accepted for vip@example.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theConfirmationMessageShouldBe(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product catalog should have searched product &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theProductCatalogShouldHaveSearchedProduct(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Unknown product cannot be ordered
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Unknown product cannot be ordered &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-errors.feature:3&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mproduct &amp#27;[1m"UNKNOWN-001"&amp#27;[22m does not exist&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.productDoesNotExist(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mcustomer &amp#27;[1m"client@example.com"&amp#27;[22m with status STANDARD orders &amp#27;[1m1&amp#27;[22m products &amp#27;[1m"UNKNOWN-001"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.customerWithStatusStandardOrdersProducts(java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22man order error should be thrown with message &amp#27;[1m"Product not found"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.anOrderErrorShouldBeThrownWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe order receipt should be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theOrderReceiptShouldBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product catalog should have searched product &amp#27;[1m"UNKNOWN-001"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theProductCatalogShouldHaveSearchedProduct(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: Product with insufficient stock cannot be ordered
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Product with insufficient stock cannot be ordered &amp#27;[90m# classpath:features/order-errors.feature:10&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22ma product &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m named &amp#27;[1m"Java Book"&amp#27;[22m costs &amp#27;[1m50.00&amp#27;[22m with stock &amp#27;[1m2&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.aProductNamedCostsWithStock(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.math.BigDecimal,int)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mcustomer &amp#27;[1m"client@example.com"&amp#27;[22m with status STANDARD orders &amp#27;[1m5&amp#27;[22m products &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.customerWithStatusStandardOrdersProducts(java.lang.String,int,java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22man order error should be thrown with message &amp#27;[1m"Insufficient stock"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.anOrderErrorShouldBeThrownWithMessage(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe order receipt should be empty&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theOrderReceiptShouldBeEmpty()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe product catalog should have searched product &amp#27;[1m"BOOK-001"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# com.example.OrderSteps.theProductCatalogShouldHaveSearchedProduct(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m
